misconfig_patterns: /pools endpoint returns cluster topology without authentication
implementationVersion in /pools response leaks Couchbase version
FTS vector search (Couchbase 7.6+) requires auth for index access

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must include implementationVersion field — uniquely identifies Couchbase /pools endpoint

deployment_tells: GET /pools returns {implementationVersion:..., componentsVersion:...} without auth — topology leak
FTS vector indexes require auth to enumerate
pivot_paths: GET /pools → Couchbase version + cluster topology without auth
GET /pools/default/buckets → bucket names (requires auth in most configs)
Web console :8091 → Administrator:password → FTS vector index list
